info.title: BoringCache API v2
info.description:
BoringCache v2 API surface for cache read/write workflows.

v2 includes:
- capabilities negotiation
- workspace/session endpoints
- cache create/list/restore/delete/check
- CAS blob stage/check/download
- CAS tag pointer publish with If-Match

get.summary: Validate token and fetch session context

post.summary: Submit proxy cache rollups, misses, and session summaries

get.summary: List caches or restore by entries query

423.description: Another upload already owns the tag

post.summary: Check cache manifests by tag and digest
Stage upload URLs for missing blobs
Resolve download URLs for entry/workspace blobs

423.description: Publish is pending server-owned completion or another writer holds the tag

ClientTypeHeader.name: X-BoringCache-Client-Type
ClientTypeHeader.description: Optional client identifier used for compatibility behavior

PendingPublishPollHeader.name: X-BoringCache-Pending-Publish-Poll
PendingPublishPollHeader.description: Indicates the client can poll upload session status instead of relying on legacy synchronous waiting

EntriesQuery.name: entries
EntriesQuery.description: Comma-separated cache tags for restore lookup
